Class Font

java.lang.Object
org.obsidium.graphics.Font
public class Font extends Object
A class that represents a font with methods to render text with this font. Available built-in font types:
  • SERIF = 0
  • SANSSERIF = 1
  • MONOSPACED = 2
  • DIALOG = 3
  • DIALOGINPUT = 4
Since:
1.0

  • Constructor Details

    • Font

      public Font(String path, float size)
      Creates a font of a .ttf file at the given path. For built in fonts use Font(int, float)
      Parameters:
      path - of the .ttf file
      size - of the font
      Since:
      1.0

    • Font

      public Font(int type, float size)
      Creates a font from a built-in type. Available built-in font types:
      • SERIF = 0
      • SANSSERIF = 1
      • MONOSPACED = 2
      • DIALOG = 3
      • DIALOGINPUT = 4
      Parameters:
      type - of the font
      size - of the font
      Since:
      1.0

  • Method Details

    • setSize

      public void setSize(float size)
      Sets the size of the font.
      Parameters:
      size -
      Since:
      1.0

    • getSize

      public float getSize()
      Returns the font size.
      Returns:
      size
      Since:
      1.0

    • getPath

      public String getPath()
      Returns the path of the font.

      If this is a custom font, it will return the path. Otherwise it will return NO_PATH.

      Returns:
      path
      Since:
      1.0

    • getType

      public int getType()
      Returns the type of font. Available types:
      • SERIF = 0
      • SANSSERIF = 1
      • MONOSPACED = 2
      • DIALOG = 3
      • DIALOGINPUT = 4

      This will return a valid type 0 - 4 if it isn't a custom font, otherwise it will return 1.

      Returns:
      type
      Since:
      1.0

    • render

      public Surface render(String text, Color color)
      Renders the font on a new surface.

      The width and height will automatically be calculated.

      Parameters:
      text - that will be rendered
      color - of the text
      Returns:
      Surface
      Since:
      1.0

    • render

      public void render(Surface surface, int x, int y, String text, Color color)
      Renders the font on this surface.
      Parameters:
      surface - that the text will be rendered too
      x - the x-coordinate where the text will be rendered to, relative to the surface
      y - the y-coordinate where the text will be rendered to, relative to the surface
      text - the text that will be rendered
      color - the color of the text
      Since:
      1.0

    • render

      public void render(Window window, int x, int y, String text, Color color)
      Renders the font on this window.
      Parameters:
      window - that the text will be rendered too
      x - the x-coordinate where the text will be rendered to, relative to the window
      y - the y-coordinate where the text will be rendered to, relative to the window
      text - the text that will be rendered
      color - the color of the text
      Since:
      1.0
